regions.text: The answer is: "Because it is going round the earth." The moon The earth
This is a cord in my hand. The cord has a weight at its end. The weight is hanging down on the cord which is in my hand.
I make the weight go round on the cord. I keep the end of the cord in my hand.
Now I let the end of the cord in my hand go. The weight goes off in a straight line. It takes the cord with it.
